title: prunus pseudocerasus subvar. humilis
intro: Prunus pseudocerasus subvar. humilis, also known as the dwarf cherry or Chinese dwarf cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Prunus pseudocerasus subvar. humilis include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to protect against cardiovascular disease and certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
